collection.title: [All] Half-Lit Worlds (on-hold)
collection.brief:
## Half-Lit Worlds

A collection of moments paused — flickering, unfinished, quietly glowing at the edge of memory.

These are the books mid-page, the shows paused in-between seasons, the games suspended at save points…  
worlds not forgotten, only resting in shadow.

**Why do they linger here?**

- The rhythm faltered — but not the feeling.  
- Time slipped by like mist.  
- The journey needed breathing room.  
- I wandered off-trail and haven’t returned — yet.  
- The light’s still on, dim but faithful.

These are half-lit worlds: not gone, not silent, simply waiting for the next step, the next page, the next moment of return.

Until then, they hum quietly… patient as dusk.
collection.html_content:
Half-Lit Worlds

A collection of moments paused — flickering, unfinished, quietly glowing at the edge of memory.

These are the books mid-page, the shows paused in-between seasons, the games suspended at save points…
worlds not forgotten, only resting in shadow.

Why do they linger here?

  • The rhythm faltered — but not the feeling.
  • Time slipped by like mist.
  • The journey needed breathing room.
  • I wandered off-trail and haven’t returned — yet.
  • The light’s still on, dim but faithful.

These are half-lit worlds: not gone, not silent, simply waiting for the next step, the next page, the next moment of return.

Until then, they hum quietly… patient as dusk.

collection.title: [Film] The Flicker Keep (favourite)
collection.brief:
### The Flicker Keep

A trove of tales sealed in celluloid dreams.  
These are not merely films watched,  
but companions met in the hush between frames—  

  - lantern-lit journeys through imagined cities,  
  - heartbeats synced to soundtracks,  
  - scenes etched into the architecture of feeling.

Woven into these reels are the visions that returned again and again,  
not just to be watched,  
but to be remembered.
collection.html_content:
The Flicker Keep

A trove of tales sealed in celluloid dreams.
These are not merely films watched,
but companions met in the hush between frames—

  • lantern-lit journeys through imagined cities,
  • heartbeats synced to soundtracks,
  • scenes etched into the architecture of feeling.

Woven into these reels are the visions that returned again and again,
not just to be watched,
but to be remembered.

collection.title: [Book] Literary Companions (favourite)
collection.brief:
## Literary Companions

Some books stay — not just on shelves, but somewhere quieter. Somewhere closer.

These are the pages that walked beside me,  
that held a light during darker hours,  
that whispered truths I hadn’t yet found the words for.

**Why are these companions?**

- Because they remembered me.  
- Because I found myself in the margins.  
- Because they changed the pace of my thinking.  
- Because I finished them… and wasn’t finished with them.  
- Because returning feels less like rereading and more like coming home.

Fiction or not, story or study, these are bound not just by ink — but by something deeper.

They are books I return to,  
books that returned something in me,  
soulbound and well-loved,  
with memories nestled softly between the lines.
collection.html_content:
Literary Companions

Some books stay — not just on shelves, but somewhere quieter. Somewhere closer.

These are the pages that walked beside me,
that held a light during darker hours,
that whispered truths I hadn’t yet found the words for.

Why are these companions?

  • Because they remembered me.
  • Because I found myself in the margins.
  • Because they changed the pace of my thinking.
  • Because I finished them… and wasn’t finished with them.
  • Because returning feels less like rereading and more like coming home.

Fiction or not, story or study, these are bound not just by ink — but by something deeper.

They are books I return to,
books that returned something in me,
soulbound and well-loved,
with memories nestled softly between the lines.

collection.title: [Game] Realmwalker's Archive (worked)
collection.brief:
## Realmwalker’s Archive

Not all journeys begin with a quest.  
Some begin behind curtains, through letters, lobbies, and lore.  
The maps were already drawn —  
but I helped guide the wind, steady the ground,  
and set the stars in motion.

These worlds were not merely played.  
They were kept, kindled, and quietly carried forward.

**This archive remembers:**

- Realms once lit by login screens and distant dawns.  
- Celebrations sparked, challenges tended, seasons turned.  
- Kingdoms that whispered their growth through spreadsheets, scrolls, and chatrooms.  
- Adventures I walked not as a hero, but as a keeper of tides and tales.

This is not a list of games.  
It is a ledger of worlds I once walked beside —  
soft-footed and unseen,  
a realmwalker by other names.

Some begin behind curtains, through letters, lobbies, and lore.

This is not a list of games.
It is a ledger of worlds I once walked beside —
soft-footed and unseen,
a realmwalker by other names.

collection.title: [Anime] Drawn to Me (favourite)
collection.brief:
## Drawn to Me

Not merely watched — but felt.  
Not just drawn — but drawn *in*.

These stories didn’t end at the credits.  
They stayed — in the quiet, in the colour of thoughts,  
in moments when real life paused and something animated filled the space.

**What lives here:**

- Tales inked in motion and meaning.  
- Characters who kept walking beside me, long after.  
- Frames that flickered once, but somehow still glow.  
- Scenes that found a place between memory and mood.  
- Worlds that didn’t ask to be remembered — but were.

This is more than animation.  
It’s the part that chose to stay.

---

ℹ️ **アニメ** (**anime**) is simply the shortened form of **アニメーション** (**animeesyon**; **animēshon**; **animation**).

ℹ️ Only non-Japanese gives it a restrictive meaning as "Japanese-only animation".

ℹ️ **アニメ** (**anime**) is a Nihongo word, thus, it's respectful to use the _**correct**_ definition.
collection.html_content:
Drawn to Me

Not merely watched — but felt.
Not just drawn — but drawn in.

These stories didn’t end at the credits.
They stayed — in the quiet, in the colour of thoughts,
in moments when real life paused and something animated filled the space.

What lives here:

  • Tales inked in motion and meaning.
  • Characters who kept walking beside me, long after.
  • Frames that flickered once, but somehow still glow.
  • Scenes that found a place between memory and mood.
  • Worlds that didn’t ask to be remembered — but were.

This is more than animation.
It’s the part that chose to stay.

ℹ️ アニメ (anime) is simply the shortened form of アニメーション (animeesyon; animēshon; animation).

ℹ️ Only non-Japanese gives it a restrictive meaning as "Japanese-only animation".

ℹ️ アニメ (anime) is a Nihongo word, thus, it's respectful to use the correct definition.

collection.title: [Game] The Questboard (wishlist)
collection.brief:
**[The Questboard]**

To the Seeker of Worlds Unwalked,  
A ledger of trials yet unclaimed awaits you.

These are not mere diversions,  
but chronicles yearning to be written:  
blades that have not yet sung,  
stars that have not yet known your name,  
kingdoms unaware of their destined champion.

Choose wisely, brave wanderer—  
for every title here is a doorway,  
and every doorway, a fate.

— *Filed by the Archivist of Longing*

collection.title: [All] Neurodivergent
collection.brief:
A curated collection of live-action productions featuring neurodivergent stories and characters. This includes representations of Autism Spectrum, ADHD, OCD, Dyslexia, Dyspraxia, Dyscalculia, Down Syndrome, Hyperlexia, and more.

* Notes have been added for productions I’ve watched or where a character is explicitly confirmed as neurodivergent.
* For works I have yet to watch, inclusion is based on (1) descriptions and (2) reviews from various sources.


### On ND Coding

Interpretations of neurodivergent coding are subjective and assessed on a case-by-case basis.


### Exclusions (subjective)

1. Works where a neuroatypical character—confirmed or not—exists purely as a literary device or to serve the plot.
1. Cases where the author has explicitly denied neurodivergent coding, even if the character is widely perceived as such.

collection.title: the post-post-apocalyptic
collection.brief:
thinking about [this article](https://www.publicbooks.org/no-future-lexicon-the-post-post-apocalyptic/).

> “What cannot be mended must be transcended.” So wrote American author Ursula K. Le Guin in Tehanu (1990), a novel that begins with a deed of unspeakable trauma and ends with an act of literal transmutation. But what lies beyond the end of the world? Casting off the trappings accreted by the post-apocalyptic genre emerge stories of the post-post-apocalyptic. Embracing new tones and structures, the post-post-apocalyptic speaks after sufficient time has elapsed since collapse, where mere survival or disaster management is no longer the all-consuming priority. Recovery and healing of nature, culture, and individuals is occurring in earnest, as new systems, norms, and practices take root. In the post-post-apocalyptic, some severance exists to separate past calamity from present instance, making direct extrapolation from “then to now” neither instructive nor fruitful. While there may be traces from the previous world, the narrative emphasis lies not in harkening back, but rather embodying the contingencies of the present out of which the novel and unexpected can arise. Offering distance and difference in vantage, the post-post-apocalyptic allows the imaginary lens to recenter its focus on a freed moment in time, along with its sovereign, mutable future.
collection.html_content:
thinking about this article.

“What cannot be mended must be transcended.” So wrote American author Ursula K. Le Guin in Tehanu (1990), a novel that begins with a deed of unspeakable trauma and ends with an act of literal transmutation. But what lies beyond the end of the world? Casting off the trappings accreted by the post-apocalyptic genre emerge stories of the post-post-apocalyptic. Embracing new tones and structures, the post-post-apocalyptic speaks after sufficient time has elapsed since collapse, where mere survival or disaster management is no longer the all-consuming priority. Recovery and healing of nature, culture, and individuals is occurring in earnest, as new systems, norms, and practices take root. In the post-post-apocalyptic, some severance exists to separate past calamity from present instance, making direct extrapolation from “then to now” neither instructive nor fruitful. While there may be traces from the previous world, the narrative emphasis lies not in harkening back, but rather embodying the contingencies of the present out of which the novel and unexpected can arise. Offering distance and difference in vantage, the post-post-apocalyptic allows the imaginary lens to recenter its focus on a freed moment in time, along with its sovereign, mutable future.

collection.title: non-usamerican movies i liked
collection.brief:
(starting from september 16 2025. will be updating)

~ movies i gave 3.5 or more ⭐

i watch way too many usamerican movies (proportionally). particularly since recent developments there, i've been wanting to change that. 

note: i've included movies from all other countries besides the US, despite their particular history of human rights violations. that's because (1) i believe that, as of today, the US has the greatest capacity to influence foreign policy and thinking through its media and (2) this is mainly an attempt to reduce my cultural dependence on a single country and diversify my perspectives.

hopefully other folks might find something interesting to watch in this list too?

game.title: Jet Set Radio
game.description:
Tag, grind, and trick to the beat in SEGA’s hit game Jet Set Radio!
 
 Fight for control of Tokyo-to, mark your turf with graffiti, tag walls, billboards, and even rival gang members! Perform tricks and flips on magnetically driven in-line skates, but watch out for the local police force! Key Features:    Heritage Collection treatment: 
 
 Now available via PC Digital download, Jet Set Radio is part of Sega’s Heritage Collection series and now features lush HD visuals, developer interviews, and amazing fan-created graffiti.
 
    Classic Beats: 
 
 Skate to the funky tunes of Pirate Radio! Jet Set Radio still features 29 of 30 tracks from the original Dreamcast release.
 
    Express yourself: 
 
 Choose from a massive catalog of classic and new graffiti or create your own and use it to tag walls, billboards, cars, and even rival gang members!
 
    The gang’s all here: 
 
 Recruit more than 10 playable characters to your gang, each with their own unique graffiti!

Marca, grinda y haz trucos con ritmo en el éxito de SEGA, Jet Set Radio. 
 
 Lucha por el control de Tokyo-to, grafitea para marcar tu territorio, firma paredes, carteleras ¡y hasta a los miembros de la banda rival! Realiza trucos y giros con tablas magnéticas, ¡pero ten cuidado con la policía! Características principales:    Tratamiento Heritage Collection: 
 
 Jet Set Radio forma parte de la serie Heritage Collection de Sega y ahora incluye gráficos en alta definición, entrevistas con los desarrolladores e increíbles grafitis creados por los aficionados.
 
    Ritmos clásicos: 
 
 ¡Patina mientras escuchas la música funky de Pirate Radio! Jet Set Radio conserva 29 de las 30 canciones de la edición original para Dreamcast.
 
    Exprésate: 
 
 Elige de entre un amplísimo catálogo de grafitis clásicos y nuevos o crea tus propios grafitis para dejar tu firma en paredes, carteleras, coches, ¡o incluso en los miembros de otras bandas!
 
    Toda la banda está aquí: 
 
 Consigue más de 10 personajes controlables para tu banda. ¡Cada uno tiene sus grafitis exclusivos!

Taguez et enchaînez en rythme grinds et autres figures dans Jet Set Radio, le jeu culte de SEGA !
 
 Battez-vous pour dominer Tokyo-to, marquez votre territoire à l'aide de graffitis, taguez les murs, les panneaux d'affichage et même les membres des gangs rivaux ! Réalisez des figures et des flips avec vos rollers, mais méfiez-vous des forces de police ! Caractéristiques :    Remis au goût du jour par la collection Heritage : 
 
 Maintenant disponible en téléchargement numérique sur PC, Jet Set Radio fait partie des titres de la collection Heritage de Sega et inclut à présent des graphismes HD riches en détails, des interviews avec les développeurs et des graffitis incroyables réalisés par les fans.
 
    Des rythmes classiques : 
 
 Faites du roller sur les titres funky de la radio pirate ! Jet Set Radio a gardé 29 des 30 morceaux du jeu original sur Dreamcast.
 
    Exprimez votre créativité : 
 
 Faites votre choix dans un catalogue impressionnant de graffitis classiques et inédits ou créez-en vous-mêmes, puis taguez les murs, les panneaux d'affichage, les voitures et même les membres de gangs rivaux !
 
    Le gang est réuni : 
 
 Recrutez plus de 10 personnages jouables dans votre gang, chacun possédant ses propres graffitis !

Taggen, grinden und führen Sie coole Tricks aus zum Beat in SEGAs Toptitel „Jet Set Radio“. 
 
 Kämpfen Sie um die Macht in Tokyo-to, markieren Sie Ihr Revier mit Graffitis, hinterlassen Sie Ihren Tag auf Mauern, Plakatwänden und sogar auf den Mitgliedern der rivalisierenden Gang! Zeigen Sie auf magnetisch betriebenen Inlinern, was Sie an Tricks und Flips draufhaben, aber passen Sie auf, dass Sie nicht der Polizei in die Quere kommen! Key Features:    Heritage Collection: 
 
 Jet Set Radio ist ab sofort als Download über PC Digital verfügbar und gehört jetzt zu Segas Heritage Collection-Serie mit gestochen scharfer HD-Grafik, Entwickler-Interviews und tollen Fan-Graffitis.
 
    Klassische Beats: 
 
 Skaten Sie zum Piratensender-Groove! Jet Set Radio beinhaltet 29 der 30 Tracks des Original-Dreamcast-Spiels.
 
    Zeigen Sie, wer Sie sind: 
 
 Wählen Sie aus einem gigantischen Katalog klassischer und neuer Graffitis oder erstellen Sie Ihre eigenen und hinterlassen Sie Ihren Tag auf Mauern, Plakatwänden, Autos und sogar gegnerischen Gangmitgliedern!
 
    Die Gang ist bereit: 
 
 Rekrutieren Sie über 10 spielbare Charaktere für Ihre Gang - alle mit individuellen, einzigartigen Graffitis!

game.title: Love at First Sight
game.description: After falling in love at first sight with the shy Sachi Usui, an injury-ridden, single-eyed high school girl, the protagonist tries to win over her lonely and isolated heart. A pure, heart-warming romance game where the apple of your eye only has one eye!

game.title: Eden*
game.description:
A tale of the planet's final love story told using the full force of minori's critically acclaimed illustrative style, engaging musical compositions, and the highly talented staff that has led fans coming back for more every single time!

The final love story on a dying planet.
In the near future, an ominous red star suddenly appears in the sky. Its presence is about to bring about the extinction of all life on Earth. The unified government proposes an evacuation project to take all of mankind into space, but in order to make the seemingly impossible project a reality, 'felixes' are brought into the world. Engineered to be highly intelligent with perpetual youth and longevity, the genetically modified superhuman felixes stand as humanity's only hope for survival.

Sion, the most gifted of the felixes, has been kept in a research facility built on a solitary island for the past hundred years. Her sole purpose, saving all of humanity. Ryou Haruna, a soldier from the Earth's unified government is sent to watch over Sion, who desperately seeks freedom from the military that's imprisoning her. Earth's last love story is about to begin.

game.title: Elden Ring
game.description:
Elden Ring is an action RPG developed by FromSoftware and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, released in February 2022. Directed by Hidetaka Miyazaki, with world-building contributions from novelist George R. R. Martin, the game features an expansive open world called the Lands Between. Players assume the role of a customisable character known as the Tarnished, who must explore this world, battle formidable enemies, and seek to restore the Elden Ring to become the Elden Lord.

The game builds on the challenging gameplay mechanics familiar from the Dark Souls series but introduces a more open-ended structure with vast exploration, dynamic weather, and a day-night cycle. It offers deep lore, complex characters, and an interconnected world filled with secrets, dungeons, and powerful bosses.

Elden Ring takes place in the Lands Between, a fictional realm over which several demigods rule. It was previously ruled over by the immortal Queen Marika, who acted as keeper of the Elden Ring, a powerful force that manifested itself as the physical concept of order. When Marika shattered the Elden Ring and disappeared, her demigod children began fighting over pieces of the Ring in an event called The Shattering. Each demigod has a shard of the Ring called a Great Rune, which corrupts them with power. In the game, the player character is a Tarnished, one of a group of exiles from the Lands Between who are summoned back after the Shattering. The player must traverse the realm to repair the Elden Ring and become the Elden Lord.

game.title: Shenzhen I/O
game.description:
"BUILD CIRCUITS. WRITE CODE. RTFM.

- Build circuits using a variety of components from different manufacturers, like microcontrollers, memory, and logic gates.
- Write code in a compact and powerful assembly language where every instruction can be conditionally executed.
- Read the included manual, which includes over 30 pages of original datasheets, reference guides, and technical diagrams.
- Get to know the colorful cast of characters at your new employer, 深圳龙腾科技有限公司 (Shenzhen Longteng Electronics Co., Ltd.), located in the electronics capital of the world.
- Get creative! Design and test your own games and devices in the sandbox.
- Engineering is hard! Take a break and play a brand-new twist on solitaire."

game.title: Dark Souls
game.description:
Dark Souls is an action role-playing game developed by FromSoftware and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment. Released in September 2011 as a spiritual sequel to Demon's Souls, it is set in a dark, medieval fantasy world. It is renowned for its challenging gameplay, intricate level design, and deep lore. Players control a customizable character known as the Chosen Undead, embarking on a perilous journey to uncover the secrets of the cursed land of Lordran.

Dark Souls is known for its punishing difficulty, requiring players to carefully manage combat, stamina, and resources while navigating hostile environments filled with dangerous enemies and formidable bosses. The game features a unique multiplayer component, allowing players to leave messages for others, summon allies for cooperative play, or invade other players' worlds for PvP combat.

The original release of Dark Souls received critical acclaim for its atmospheric world, innovative mechanics, and rewarding gameplay, solidifying its place as a seminal title in the action RPG genre.

game.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl
game.description:
S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  About the Game The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

localized_description.text:
S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
   
 准备好冒险闯入封锁区，伺机从中大捞一笔，乃至挖掘出掩藏在切尔诺贝利核心地带的真相。   
  * 在栩栩如生的开放世界中谱写史诗级非线性故事
 * 类型多样的敌人和上百种武器组合 
 * 行为模式各异的传奇变种生物 
 * 价值惊人的神器和无情的异常事件 
  探索传奇的《潜行者》世界，同时体验!
 
 
  关于游戏 封锁区，原先是切尔诺贝利核电站附近的禁区。此地危机四伏、难以预测。封锁区本就是世上最危险的地方，而2006年发生的一起诡谲事故，更让这里疑云密布。异常现象层出不穷、神器琳琅满目，饥肠辘辘的变种生物伺机而动，贪得无厌的暴徒四处横行，而潜行者们也来到这里，探求新生和财路……值得一提的是，你可以在《潜行者：切尔诺贝利的阴影》扮演上述角色！ 探索 
 为了生存，真正的潜行者绝不会停止探索。珍贵的战利品、装备和补给、新朋友、捷径或有关这片土地恐怖谜团的答案，都能带来一线生机。准备好前往封锁区中心放手一搏吧，这里封锁严密，不速之客难以涉足。 险境 
 要达成目标，潜行者必将踏过坎坷荆棘。无论是暗藏杀机的异常现象（那是能让久经沙场的战士粉身碎骨的恐怖力量），抑或是饥肠辘辘的变种生物，还是反水背叛，这些都能让你身陷绝境。拿出真本事，保持必胜的决心，与无数敌对势力和变种生物相抗衡。即使单独行动，也得时刻保持警惕，毕竟在这片封锁区内，一片叶、一株草都可能暗藏杀机。 废土 
 萧瑟凄凉的阴郁氛围笼罩着这片废土，成百上千的流浪者居住于此。不过，潜行者总是形单影只，往往面临着潜藏的危险。仔细倾听，步步为营，除了自己和盖革计数器，对所有人保持怀疑。只有准确的直觉、精湛的技能和冷酷的胆识才能让独行的潜行者在封锁区内找到方向
 
  游戏特色： 
 
   采用黑暗东欧地区的科幻背景设定，集动作、潜行、恐怖、生存和RPG元素为一体。
   在这片危险地域中，时间永远停滞，为你营造独一无二的孤寂氛围。
   游戏地点取材于真实的切尔诺贝利禁区：普里皮亚季、切尔诺贝利核电站等。
   敌对势力和NPC均由智能AI接管，有着各自的生活模式，能够对变化作出反应。
   非线性的故事体验，你的选择可以触发多种结局。
   动态昼夜循环和天气变化将会对游玩产生影响。
   多人模式最多支持32名玩家同图游玩。

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  關於此遊戲 The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepárate para entrar en la Zona bajo tu propia responsabilidad para intentar hacer una fortuna o descubrir la verdad que se oculta en el corazón de Chernóbil.                                                        
  
 * FASCINANTE HISTORIA NO LINEAL EN UN MUNDO ABIERTO FLUIDO 
 * NUMEROSOS ENEMIGOS Y CIENTOS DE COMBINACIONES DE ARMAS 
 * MUTANTES LEGENDARIOS CON COMPORTAMIENTOS DISTINTOS 
 * ARTEFACTOS VALIOSÍSIMOS Y ANOMALÍAS INMISERICORDES 
  Descubre el legendario universo de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. y su experiencia!
 
 
  Acerca del juego La Zona, un lugar lleno de insondables maravillas y siniestras amenazas, es el antiguo territorio de exclusión cercano a la Planta de energía nuclear de Chernóbil. El sector más peligroso de la Tierra se cubrió aún más de misterio tras un extraño accidente en 2006. Está repleto de anomalías con valiosos artefactos, voraces mutantes y mezquinos matones, además de stalkers que buscan una nueva vida y formas de enriquecerse… ¡Ese podrías ser tú en S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! BÚSQUEDA 
 Para sobrevivir, un stalker que se las precie nunca puede dejar de buscar. Son cosas como los valiosos trofeos, el equipamiento y los suministros, los nuevos amigos, los atajos o las respuestas a los enigmas más macabros de estas tierras las que te ofrecen una oportunidad de eludir la muerte, así que prepárate para una incursión en busca de tu destino en el centro de la Zona, el lugar más protegido contra visitantes indeseados. PELIGROS 
 El viaje de un stalker hasta su meta nunca es fácil. Una anomalía traicionera capaz de acabar incluso con los luchadores más veteranos, un voraz mutante extraviado, una traición incomprensible... hay muchas cosas que pueden costarte la vida. Prepárate para poner a prueba tu destreza y tu coraje para resistir a rivales y mutantes superiores a ti en número. Estate alerta incluso cuando estés a solas, pues, en la Zona, casi nada es lo que parece a primera vista. DESOLACIÓN 
 Estas tierras inhóspitas atrapadas en un eterno otoño están llenas de cientos de vagabundos. Sin embargo, un stalker siempre va por su cuenta y se enfrenta a peligros a menudo ocultos. Escucha con atención, calcula bien cada paso que das y no confíes en nadie salvo en ti y en tu contador Geiger. Solo la intuición combinada con maestría, valentía y mente fría pueden salvar a un stalker libre de perderse en la Zona.
 
  Características del juego: 
 
   Una mezcla de elementos de acción, sigilo, horror, supervivencia y rol en un oscuro marco de ciencia ficción en Europa del Este. 
   La particular atmósfera de soledad en un lugar peligroso donde se ha parado el tiempo para siempre.
   Ubicaciones trasladadas al juego desde la zona de exclusión de Chernóbil real: Prypiat, la central nuclear y muchas más.
   Inteligencia artificial de rivales y PNJ que viven sus propias vidas y son capaces de reaccionar a los cambios.
   Una historia no lineal en la que tus decisiones te llevan a uno de varios finales.
   Cambios dinámicos en el ciclo de día y noche, y condiciones meteorológicas que afectan a la forma de jugar. 
   Modos multijugador con hasta 32 jugadores en un mapa.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Préparez-vous à entrer dans la Zone à vos risques et périls pour faire fortune et qui sait peut-être trouver la vérité qui se cache dans le cœur de Chernobyl.
  * UNE HISTOIRE ÉPIQUE ET NON LINÉAIRE DANS UN MONDE ENTIÈREMENT OUVERT
 * DES ENNEMIS VARIÉS ET DES CENTAINES DE COMBINAISONS D'ARMES 
 * DES MUTANTS LÉGENDAIRES AVEC DES MODÈLES COMPORTEMENTAUX UNIQUES 
 * DES ARTEFACTS INESTIMABLES ET DES ANOMALIES IMPITOYABLES 
  Découvrez l'univers légendaire de S.T.A.L.K.E.R. et vivez une expérience incroyable!
 
 
  À propos du jeu La Zone, un endroit rempli de phénomènes incroyables et de terribles menaces, ancienne zone d’exclusion près de la centrale nucléaire de Chernobyl. Le mystère entourant l’endroit le plus dangereux de la terre s’est encore épaissi après un étrange incident en 2006. Des anomalies contenant de précieux artefacts, des mutants affamés et des rapaces de la pire espèce grouillent sur ces terres où les Stalkers affluent à la recherche d’une nouvelle vie et de façons de s’enrichir. Incarnez l’un d’entre eux dans S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl ! RECHERCHE 
 Pour survivre, un vrai Stalker ne doit jamais cesser ses recherches. Les trophées de valeur, l’équipement et les provisions, les nouveaux amis, les raccourcis ou les réponses aux énigmes les plus mystérieuses de ces terres... tous ces éléments vous donneront une petite chance de survie. Alors, préparez-vous à partir à l’aventure à la recherche de votre destin au centre de la Zone, un lieu top secret à l’abri des regards indésirables. DANGERS 
 La voie d’un Stalker est toujours parsemée d’embûches. Des anomalies sournoises pouvant terrasser les combattants les plus aguerris, des mutants voraces en liberté semant le chaos, des traîtrises cinglantes... voilà qui risque de vous coûter la vie. Exploitez au mieux vos compétences et faites preuve de bon sens pour échapper à vos rivaux et résister aux mutants toujours plus nombreux. Restez sur vos gardes quand vous vous retrouvez seul. Ici, dans la Zone, rien ne ressemble à ce qu’il y paraît au premier abord. DÉSOLATION 
 Ces terres désolées aux allures d’automne éternel regorgent de centaines de vagabonds. Mais un Stalker est toujours livré à lui-même, forcé d’affronter des dangers souvent invisibles. Tendez toujours l’oreille, calculez chacun de vos pas et ne faites confiance qu’à vous-même et à votre compteur Geiger. Seule l’intuition associée au talent et au courage sans faille peut empêcher un Stalker de se perdre dans la Zone.
 
  Caractéristiques du jeu : 
 
   Un mélange d’action, d’horreur et de survie ponctué d’éléments de RPG au cœur d’un environnement de science-fiction lugubre de l’Europe de l’Est.
   Atmosphère unique de solitude dans un lieu dangereux où le temps s’est arrêté à jamais.
   Lieux réels tirés de la véritable zone d’exclusion de Tchernobyl transférés dans le jeu : Pripyat, la centrale nucléaire de Tchernobyl et bien d’autres encore.
   Des adversaires et des PNJ intelligents capables de mener leur propre vie et de réagir aux changements.
   Un scénario non linéaire dans lequel vos choix mèneront à de nombreuses fins différentes.
   Un cycle jour-nuit et des conditions météo aux changements dynamiques qui modifient l’expérience de jeu.
   Des modes multijoueur pouvant compter jusqu’à 32 joueurs sur une carte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel Die Zone, ein Ort voller unergründlicher Wunder und finsterer Bedrohungen, ist das ehemalige Sperrgebiet nahe des Atomkraftwerks Tschernobyl. Der gefährlichste Ort der Welt wirft seit einem mysteriösen Unfall im Jahr 2006 noch mehr Fragen auf. Seither wimmelt es in dem Gebiet von Anomalien mit kostbaren Artefakten, hungrigen Mutanten, gierigen Banditen und Stalkern, die auf der Suche nach einem neuen Leben und dem großen Geld sind … Werde einer von ihnen in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! DIE UNAUFHÖRLICHE SUCHE 
 Um ihr Überleben zu sichern, müssen Stalker unaufhörlich suchen und sammeln: Wertvolle Trophäen, Ausrüstung und Vorräte, neue Freunde, Abkürzungen oder auch Antworten auf die düstersten Rätsel dieses Gebiets können dazu beitragen, ihre Überlebenschancen zu erhöhen. Stell dich auf der Suche nach deinem Schicksal also auf Beutezüge im Herzen der Zone ein – jenem Ort, der wie kein anderer vor ungebetenen Gästen geschützt wird. GEFAHREN AN JEDER ECKE 
 Der Weg eines Stalkers zu seinem Ziel ist niemals ein Spaziergang: Von heimtückischen Anomalien, die selbst erfahrenste Soldaten in die Knie zwingen, über Scharen raubgieriger Mutanten bis hin zu bitterem Verrat – all diese Faktoren können dich das Leben kosten. Verlasse dich auf deine Fähigkeiten und deinen Schneid, um gegen die Vielzahl an Rivalen und Mutanten zu bestehen. Bleib wachsam, selbst wenn du allein bist, denn hier in der Zone ist selten etwas so, wie es auf den ersten Blick scheint. TROSTLOSIGKEIT 
 Die trostlose, im ewigen Herbst gefangene Landschaft wird von Hunderten von Landstreichern heimgesucht. Dennoch sind Stalker stets auf sich allein gestellt und stoßen häufig auf ungeahnte Gefahren. Spitze deine Ohren, plane jeden Schritt voraus und vertraue niemandem außer dir selbst und dem Geigerzähler. Nur die eigene Intuition im Zusammenspiel mit ihren Fähigkeiten und ihrem unbändigen Mut können Stalker davor bewahren, sich in der Zone zu verlieren.
 
  Features: 
 
   Eine Kombination aus Action-, Stealth-, Horror-, Survival- und Rollenspielelementen in einer düsteren, osteuropäischen Sci-Fi-Welt.
   Eine einzigartige Atmosphäre der Einsamkeit an einem gefährlichen Ort, an dem die Zeit für immer stillsteht.
   Gebiete der realen Tschernobyl-Sperrzone, die ins Spiel übernommen wurden: Prypjat, das Atomkraftwerk Tschernobyl und viele mehr.
   Clevere KI für Gegner und NPCs, die eigenen Aktivitäten nachgehen und auf Veränderungen reagieren können.
   Eine nichtlineare Story, in der deine Entscheidungen zahlreiche verschiedene Enden herbeiführen können.
   Dynamische Änderungen des Tag-Nacht-Rhythmus und der Wetterbedingungen mit Auswirkungen auf das Gameplay.
   Mehrspielermodi mit bis zu 32 Spielern auf einer Karte.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
   
 富を築くか、あるいはチョルノブイリの心臓部に隠された真実を求めて、危険なゾーンに足を踏み入れましょう。   
  * シームレスなオープンワールドで繰り広げられる壮大な非線形のストーリー
 * 多種多様な敵、そして何百通りもの組み合わせが可能な武器 
 * 異なる行動モデルを持つ伝説的なミュータント 
 * 計り知れない価値があるアーティファクトと容赦ないアノーマリー 
  伝説的なS.T.A.L.K.E.Rの世界とゲーム体験を楽しもう。!
 
 
  ゲームについて 底知れぬ謎と不吉な脅威に満ちた場所、ゾーン。かつてチョルノブイリ原子力発電所の近くに存在した立ち入り禁止区域である。地球上で最も危険なこの場所は、2006年の得体の知れない事故の後、謎がさらに深まった。貴重なアーティファクトを持つアノマリー、飢えたミュータント、強欲な悪党たちが、新しい生活と一攫千金を狙うストーカーたちと共にこの地に押し寄せた。『S.T.A.L.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl』で未知との遭遇を楽しもう。 探索 
 真のストーカーとして生き残るためには探索を続けなければならない。貴重なトロフィー、装備、物資、新たな仲間、近道、そしてこの地の謎を解き明かすことが、生き残る可能性を高めるのである。邪魔者たちによる鉄壁の警護が敷かれたゾーン中心部で、自らの運命を切り開け。 危険 
 ストーカーの目的地までの道のりは、決して平坦なものではない。経験豊富な人間でさえも太刀打ちできない危険なアノマリー、貪欲なミュータント、裏切り、これらのどれもがプレイヤーの命を奪うことになりかねない。数で勝る強敵やミュータントに対抗できるのは自身の腕と度量のみ。一人でいるときも油断は禁物。ここゾーンでは、想定外の事態は当たり前なのだから…。 荒廃 
 この荒涼とした常秋の地は、数多の浮浪者で溢れている。しかし、ストーカーは常に一人で行動しており、しばしば目に見えない危険に直面する。すべてに注意深く耳を傾けつつ移動し、自分自身とガイガーカウンター以外には何も信用してはならない。ゾーンで生き残るためには、直感と熟練の技、そして冷静な判断力が必要となる。
 
  ゲームの特徴： 
 
   東欧を舞台に、アクション、ステルス、ホラー、サバイバル、ロールプレイングの要素を掛け合わせたダークなSF。
   時間が永遠に止まった危険な場所で孤立する独特の設定。
   プリピャチなどの実際のチョルノブイリ立入禁止区域が登場。
   変化に柔軟に対応可能な優れたAIが組み込まれた対戦相手とNPC。
   選択肢によってエンディングが分岐するストーリー。
   ゲームプレイに影響を与える昼夜のサイクルや天候のダイナミックな変化。
   1つのマップに最大32人が参加できるマルチプレイヤーモード。

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  About the Game The Zone, a place full of unfathomable wonders and sinister threats – former exclusion territory near the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant. This most dangerous place on Earth became even more mysterious after an obscure accident in 2006. Anomalies with precious artifacts, starving mutants and greedy thugs have flooded these lands along with stalkers searching for a new life and ways to get rich… Feel as one of them in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! SEARCHING 
 To survive, a true stalker must not stop his search. Valuable trophies, equipment and supplies, new friends, shortcuts or answers to the grimmest riddles of these lands are what give a chance not to perish. So prepare for a foray to find your fate in the Center of the Zone, the most protected place from unwanted guests. HAZARD 
 The path of a stalker to his goal is never a walk in the park. A treacherous anomaly, able to mash even the most experienced fighter, the stray of ravenous mutants or jarring betrayal – any of these things can cost your life. Get ready to check your skills and gumption, enduring the superior numbers of rivals and mutants. Stay alert even when you are alone – here at the Zone, everything is rarely what it seems at first glance. DESOLATION 
 These desolate lands of eternal autumn are full of hundreds of vagabonds. Though, the stalker is always on his own, facing dangers that are often unseen. Listen carefully, calculate every step and trust no one but yourself and Geiger counter. Only intuition combined with mastery and ice-cold guts can save a free stalker from being Lost to the Zone.
 
  Game Features: 
 
   A mix of action, horror, survival, and RPG elements in a dark Eastern European sci-fiction setting.
   The unique atmosphere of loneliness in a dangerous place where time has stopped forever.
   Locations transferred to the game from the real Chornobyl Exclusion Zone: Pripyat, ChNPP, and many others.
   Smart AI of opponents and NPCs who live their own lives and are capable of reacting to changes.
   A non-linear story in which your choices lead to one of many endings.
   Dynamic changes in the day-night cycle and weather conditions that affect the gameplay.
   Multiplayer modes with up to 32 players on one map.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Prepare to enter the Zone for your own risk striving to make a fortune out of it or even to find the Truth concealed in the Heart of Chornobyl.
  * EPIC NONLINEAR STORY IN SEAMLESS OPEN WORLD
 * VARIETY OF ENEMIES AND HUNDREDS OF WEAPON COMBINATIONS 
 * LEGENDARY MUTANTS WITH DIFFERENT BEHAVIOUR MODELS 
 * ARTIFACTS OF INCREDIBLE VALUE AND UNFORGIVING ANOMALIES 
  Discover the legendary S.T.A.L.K.E.R. universe!
 
 
  Om spillet I 1986, indtraf verdenshistoriens største atomkatastrofe på atomkraftværket i Tjernobyl. De sovjetiske myndigheder etablerede en 30 km bred 'Udelukkelseszone' rundt om denne radioaktive ødemark, men i 2006 rystede endnu en eksplosion den hærgede reaktor, udslettede alle levende væsner og fik zonens grænser til at bevæge sig udad. Fra dette epicenter strømmede bølger af muterede skabninger, dødbringende stråling og en underlig, abnorm energi. Zonen blev afspærret af militæret, som var parat til at åbne ild mod enhver, som var tåbelig nok til at trodse rædslerne.
 					Vi er nu i 2012. Folk har vovet sig længere og længere ind i hjertet af Zonen, drevet af beretninger om besynderlige 'artefakter', som er gennemsyret af abnorm energi. Lejesoldater og skattejægere kæmper om at få fat på disse artefakter, som kan indbringe svimlende summer på det sorte marked. Andre forsøger at finde sandheden bag Zonen, mens atter andre blot nyder stedets ubeboelige lovløshed. Uanset, hvad der driver dem, er disse individer - klunsere, overtrædere, eventyrere, eneboere, dræbere, opdagelsesrejsende og røvere - blevet kendt som S.T.A.L.K.E.R.s.
 					Du vågner op i Zonen som en sådan S.T.A.L.K.E.R. og kæmper for at overleve i dette menneskeskabte helvede, mens du prøver at finde frem til sandheden om Tjernobyls dystre fortid og ildevarslende fremtid.
 					  Et gribende handlingsforløb blandes gnidningsløst med en levende, åndende, ikke-lineær åben verden, som styres af det revolutionerende 'A-Life'-system.
 					  Modelleret nøjagtigt efter virkelige bygninger og steder fra dybt inde i Tjernobyls udelukkelseszone.
 					  Enestående 'Survival FPS'-gameplay - kombinerer action-, snigeri-, overlevelses- og rollespilselementer til en oplevelse uden sidestykke i Zonen.
 					  AI-system til vurdering af fjendetrusler - computerstyrede karakterer reagerer dynamisk på omgivelser og situationer.
 					  Brutalt realistisk kampmekanik - våben har nøjagtige, ballistiske egenskaber og kan modificeres med lyddæmpere og teleskopsigter.
 					  Dynamisk døgn- og vejrsystem påvirker gameplayet direkte.
 					  Avancerede fysiske effekter og dynamiske lyseffekter drevet af den specielle 'X-Ray Engine'.
 					  Intens multiplayer-action, der understøtter op til 32 spillere.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl      
  
  Preparati a entrare nella Zona a tuo rischio e pericolo per fare fortuna. Potresti perfino arrivare a scoprire la verità nascosta nel cuore di Chornobyl!
  * UN'EPICA STORIA NON LINEARE IN UN VASTO MONDO APERTO
 * TANTI NEMICI E CENTINAIA DI COMBINAZIONI DI ARMI 
 * MUTANTI LEGGENDARI CON DIVERSI MODELLI DI COMPORTAMENTO 
 * MANUFATTI DI INCREDIBILE VALORE E ANOMALIE PERICOLOSE 
  Scopri il leggendario universo di S.T.A.L.K.E.R. e troverai!
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco La Zona ti aspetta, un luogo stracolmo di incomprensibili meraviglie e misteriose insidie... un tempo zona di alienazione nei pressi della Centrale Nucleare di Chornobyl. Si tratta di uno dei luoghi più pericolosi della Terra, reso ancor più misterioso in seguito a un oscuro incidente avvenuto nel 2006. Anomalie che custodiscono preziosi reperti, mutanti famelici e avidi criminali hanno invaso questo territorio insieme agli stalker, alla ricerca di una nuova vita ed espedienti per arricchirsi... Diventa uno di loro in S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Shadow of Chernobyl! RICERCA 
 Per sopravvivere, un vero stalker non deve mai smettere di cercare. Solo trovando reperti preziosi, equipaggiamento, rifornimenti, nuovi amici, scorciatoie e risposte agli enigmi più lugubri di questi luoghi potrai riuscire a cavartela. Preparati a lottare per trovare il tuo destino nel centro della Zona, il luogo più protetto dalle intrusioni di ospiti indesiderati. PERICOLO 
 La missione di uno stalker per raggiungere il proprio obiettivo non è certo una passeggiata. Un'anomalia insidiosa, capace di fare a pezzi anche il guerriero più esperto, la presenza di mutanti assetati di sangue o un tradimento inaspettato... sono tutti pericoli in agguato che potrebbero costarti la vita. Preparati a mettere alla prova la tua abilità e la tua intraprendenza, resistendo ai nemici e ai mutanti in soverchiante superiorità numerica. Non abbassare la guardia neppure quando sei solo... Qui nella Zona, nulla è ciò che sembra. DESOLAZIONE 
 Queste terre desolate, avvolte da un autunno senza fine, pullulano di centinaia di vagabondi. Nonostante tutto, lo stalker è sempre solo, pronto a fronteggiare pericoli spesso imprevisti. Ascolta attentamente ogni rumore, pondera ogni singolo passo e non fidarti di niente e di nessuno, fatta eccezione per il tuo contatore Geiger. Solo l'intuizione, unita all'abilità e ai nervi saldi, potranno salvare uno stalker solitario ed evitargli di finire disperso nella Zona.
 
  Caratteristiche di gioco: 
 
   Un mix di azione, furtività, orrore, sopravvivenza ed elementi RPG nell'oscura e fantascientifica ambientazione dell'Europa orientale.
   La peculiare atmosfera di solitudine all'interno di un luogo estremamente pericoloso, dove il tempo si è fermato per sempre.
   Le ambientazioni ricreate nel gioco si basano sulla vera zona di alienazione di Chornobyl: Pripyat, ChNPP e molti altri scenari.
   Nemici e personaggi non giocanti sono dotati di una complessa IA che gli permette di vivere la propria quotidianità e reagire ai cambiamenti.
   Una storia non lineare dove le tue scelte potranno condurti a finali differenti.
   I cambiamenti dinamici nel ciclo giorno-notte e nelle condizioni meteo influiscono sul gameplay.
   Modalità multiplayer con un massimo di 32 giocatori presenti su una singola mappa.

game.title: #hasicontent
game.description:
Take fotos of the bunnys in your garden

Hasi (noun) [colloq.]

 German for Bunny

  #hasicontent  is a micro-game about taking photos of wild Bunnys in your garden for your friends on Instagram. 

 Carrots bring all the bunnys to the yard, but they cost you 100 likes. But the Bunnys will tell their friends and more show up in the future.

 The game has no goal. Just watch cute Bunnys for one or two minutes and give them carrots. They'll love it :)

  Controls:

  Move the camera with the Arrow-keys Snap photos with X Throw a carrot with C
  Behind the game:

  My girlfriend and I moved to a new apartment recently and discovered wild  Bunnys in our garden. They were so cute, i had to take photos of them and share them with my friends on Instagram. So i made a tiny game about it. 

 Lo-Fi Bunnys to chill and snap photos to.

game.title: Portal
game.description: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

localized_description.text: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.
《传送门》（Portal）是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称射击/解谜游戏，于2007年与半条命2三部曲（HL2、HL2EP1、HL2EP2)《军团要塞2》游戏一起捆绑于橙盒(The Orange Box)上市，另外也有Xbox 360以及PS3的版本。游戏使用Source引擎。游戏的特色是不寻常的逻辑思考部份，玩家必须解决一些棘手及有趣的逻辑问题才能得到过关的方法

Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

Portal's plot is revealed to the player via audio messages or "announcements" from GLaDOS and visual elements inside rooms found in later levels. According to The Final Hours of Portal 2, the year is established to be "somewhere in 2010"—twelve years after Aperture Science has been abandoned.

The game begins with Chell waking up from a stasis bed and hearing instructions and warnings from GLaDOS, an artificial intelligence, about upcoming tests. Chell enters into distinct chambers that introduce players to the game's mechanics, sequentially. GLaDOS's announcements serve as instructions to Chell and help the player progress through the game, but also develops the atmosphere and characterizes the AI as a person.[4] Chell is promised cake as her reward if she completes all test chambers.[19]

Chell proceeds through the empty Enrichment Center, with GLaDOS as her only interaction. As the player nears completion, GLaDOS's motives and behavior turn more sinister; although she is designed to appear encouraging, GLaDOS's actions and speech suggest insincerity and callous disregard for the safety and well-being of the test subjects. The test chambers become increasingly dangerous as Chell proceeds, tests including a live-fire course designed for military androids, as well as some chambers flooded with a hazardous liquid. In another chamber, GLaDOS notes the importance of the Weighted Companion Cube, a waist-high crate with a single large pink heart on each face, for helping Chell to complete the test. However, GLaDOS declares it must be euthanized in an "emergency intelligence incinerator" before Chell can continue.[17] Some later chambers include automated turrets with childlike voices (also voiced by McLain) that fire at Chell, only to sympathize with her after being destroyed or disabled.[20][21]

After Chell completes the final test chamber, GLaDOS maneuvers Chell into an incinerator in an attempt to kill her. Chell escapes with the portal gun and makes her way through the maintenance areas within the Enrichment Center.[22] GLaDOS panics and insists that she was pretending to kill Chell as part of testing. GLaDOS then asks Chell to assume the "party escort submission position", lying face-first on the ground, so that a "party associate" can take her to her reward, but Chell continues her escape. In this section, GLaDOS communes with Chell as it becomes clear the AI had killed everyone else in the center.[11][12] Chell makes her way through the maintenance areas and empty office spaces behind the chambers, sometimes following graffiti messages which point in the right direction. These backstage areas, which are in an extremely dilapidated state, stand in stark contrast to the pristine test chambers. The graffiti includes statements such as "the cake is a lie", and pastiches of Emily Dickinson's poem "The Chariot", Henry Wadsworth Longfellow's "The Reaper and the Flowers", and Emily Brontë's "No Coward Soul Is Mine", referring to and mourning the death of the Companion Cube.[4]

GLaDOS attempts to dissuade Chell with threats of physical harm and misleading statements as Chell makes her way deeper into the maintenance areas. Chell reaches a large chamber where GLaDOS's hardware hangs overhead. GLaDOS continues to threaten Chell, but during the exchange, a sphere falls off of GLaDOS and Chell drops it in an incinerator. GLaDOS reveals that Chell has just destroyed the morality core or her conscience, one of the multiple "personality cores" that Aperture Science employees installed after the AI flooded the enrichment center with neurotoxin gas. With it removed, she can access its emitters again. A six-minute countdown starts as Chell dislodges and incinerates more of GLaDOS' personality cores, while GLaDOS discourages her both verbally, with taunts and juvenile insults, and physically by firing rockets at her. After Chell destroys the last personality core, a malfunction tears the room apart and transports everything to the surface. Chell is then seen lying outside the facility's gates amid the remains of GLaDOS. Following the announcement of Portal 2, the ending was expanded in a later update. In this retroactive continuity, Chell is dragged away from the scene by an unseen entity speaking in a robotic voice, thanking her for assuming the "party escort submission position".[15][23]

The final scene, after a long and speedy zoom through the bowels of the facility, shows a Black Forest cake,[24] and the Weighted Companion Cube, surrounded by a mix of shelves containing dozens of apparently inactive personality cores. The cores begin to light up, before a robotic arm descends and extinguishes the candle on the cake, causing the room to blackout.[25] As the credits roll, GLaDOS delivers a concluding report: the song "Still Alive", which declares the experiment to be a huge success, as well as serving to indicate to the player that GLaDOS is still alive,[26] that her "happy" core was not disabled.

Portal™ is a new single player game from Valve. Set in the mysterious Aperture Science Laboratories, Portal has been called one of the most innovative new games on the horizon and will offer gamers hours of unique gameplay.
 
					The game is designed to change the way players approach, manipulate, and surmise the possibilities in a given environment; similar to how Half-Life® 2's Gravity Gun innovated new ways to leverage an object in any given situation.
 
					Players must solve physical puzzles and challenges by opening portals to maneuvering objects, and themselves, through space.

Portal™ es la nueva aventura para un solo jugador de Valve. Ambientado en los misteriosos laboratorios de Aperture Science, Portal ha sido calificado como uno de los juegos más innovadores de los últimos tiempos y ofrece incontables horas de rompecabezas nunca vistos.
 

 
					El juego está diseñado para cambiar radicalmente el modo en que los jugadores enfocan, sopesan y reaccionan a las circunstancias en un entorno determinado, al igual que la pistola antigravedad abrió un nuevo mundo de posibilidades a la hora de manipular objetos.
 

 
					Los jugadores deben resolver rompecabezas y desafíos basados en las leyes físicas abriendo portales y desplazando objetos, o incluso sus propios avatares, a través del espacio.

Portal™ est un nouveau jeu solo signé Valve. Avec pour décor les mystérieux laboratoires Aperture Science, Portal s'impose par son côté innovant et garantit aux joueurs un gameplay et une longévité à toute épreuve.
 

 
					Le jeu a été conçu pour amener les joueurs à repenser la façon dont ils abordent et envisagent les possibilités d'un environnement donné, un peu comme le pistolet anti-gravité de Half-Life® 2 avait en son temps innové en proposant de nouvelles manières de tirer parti d'un objet dans une situation précise.
 

 
					Le joueur doit résoudre des énigmes et relever différents défis en ouvrant des portails afin de manipuler des objets et de se déplacer lui-même dans l'espace.

Portal™ ist ein neues Valve-Spiel im Einzelspielermodus. Portal, dessen Handlung in den geheimnisvollen Aperture Science Laboratories spielt, gilt als eines der innovativsten Spiele überhaupt und bietet Spielern viele Stunden voller einzigartiger Spielunterhaltung.
 
Die Spieler dieses Spiels können die Möglichkeiten einer gegebenen Umgebung auf eine völlig neue Weise ausschöpfen, so wie das Gravitron in Half-Life® 2 neue Möglichkeiten der Nutzung eines Objekts in verschiedenen Situationen bietet.
 
Die Spieler müssen mit zwei Portalen Rätsel lösen, sich Herausforderungen stellen und auf diese Weise verschiedene Objekte – und sich selbst – bewegen.

O Portal™ é um novo jogo da Valve para um jogador. Passado nos misteriosos Laboratórios Aperture Science, Portal é considerado um dos jogos mais inovadores do horizonte e irá proporcionar aos jogadores horas de jogo sem igual.
 

 
O jogo foi concebido para alterar a forma como os jogadores abordam, manipulam e avaliam as possibilidades num dado ambiente; comparável à forma como a Arma Antigravidade do Half-Life 2 inovou as possibilidades de tirar partido de um objeto em qualquer situação.
 

 
Os jogadores têm de resolver quebra-cabeças físicos e desafios abrindo portais para manobrar objetos, e a si próprios, pelo espaço.

Portal™ er et nyt singleplayer-spil fra Valve. Portal, der udspiller sig i det mystiske Aperture Science Laboratories, er blevet kaldt et af de mest innovative nye spil i vente og vil byde gamere på mange timers unikt gameplay.
 

 
Spillet er designet til at ændre den måde, hvorpå spillere tackler, manipulerer og gisner om mulighederne i et givent område - i stil med, hvordan Half-Life® 2's Tyngdekraftvåben skabte nye måder at udnytte objekter på i en given situation.
 

 
Spillere skal løse fysiske gåder og udfordringer ved at åbne portaler, som tillader dem at teleportere både objekter og sig selv gennem et rum.

Portal™ è un nuovo gioco per giocatore singolo di Valve. Ambientato nei misteriosi laboratori di Aperture Science, Portal è stato giudicato uno dei titoli più innovativi del momento e offre ore di giocabilità unica.
 

 
					Il gioco è progettato per modificare le modalità di approccio, manipolazione e analisi delle possibilità all'interno di un dato ambiente, proprio come la pistola gravitazionale di Half-Life® 2 ha innovato i modi di sfruttare gli oggetti in ogni situazione.
 

 
					I giocatori devono risolvere rompicapo fisici aprendo portali, in modo da trasportare nello spazio se stessi o altri oggetti.

《传送门》是一款由Valve所开发的第一人称平台解谜游戏，于2007年10月9日与《半条命2：第二章》、《军团要塞2》等游戏一起装置于《橙盒》游戏包上市，可以在Windows、Xbox 360与PlayStation 3三种平台上运行。除了购买《橙盒》外，玩家也可以透过Steam在线服务购买该游戏，或是在2008年4月9日后直接购买该游戏的独立零售版本。2008年10月22日，一个名为《传送门：仍然活着》（英语：Portal: Still Alive）的独立版本在Xbox Live Arcade中发布。在2010年5月12日，Valve成功将Steam平台移植到Mac OS X，并且将该游戏移植到Mac OS X。2013年Valve将游戏移植到Linux系统中，5月2日发布beta版，7月24日发布正式版本。2014年5月12日，发布基于Nvidia Shield解决方案的Android版本。

该游戏以一连串的解谜难关组成，玩家必须利用手中的“光圈科学手持传送门装置”（简称为传送枪）打造传送门，为自己开条到出口的路。该游戏只有两个人物，一个是主角，名为雪儿（英语：Chell），另一个是名为GLaDOS（Generic Lifeform and Disk Operating System，通用生命体与磁盘操作系统）的人工智能。游戏内的难关全部由GLaDOS所设置。GLaDOS宣称，只要主角能解开所有的谜团（“完成测试”），就可以获得蛋糕。该游戏的创作概念源自一群迪吉彭理工学院学生开发的解谜游戏《Narbacular Drop》，后来这些学生被维尔福雇用，而《传送门》就是他们日后的创作结晶。

虽然该游戏的剧情长度很短，但该游戏依然被认为是2007年最出色的游戏之一。该游戏独特的玩法以及黑色幽默的剧情普遍获得评论家赞赏，另外很多评论家也特别赞赏游戏对于GLaDOS的角色塑造与片尾曲《仍然活着(Still Alive)》。由于该游戏很受到玩家的欢迎，维尔福也推出一系列的相关商品，许多玩家也自制游戏内的蛋糕与相关物品。

续作《传送门2》已于2011年4月18日推出。

game.brief: Waking up in a seemingly empty laboratory, the player is made to complete various physics-based puzzle challenges through numerous test chambers in order to test out the new Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device, without an explanation as to how, why or by whom.

game.title: Cyberpunk 2077
game.description:
Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world action-adventure game set in Night City, a sprawling metropolis driven by power, glamour, and body modification. Players assume the role of V, a mercenary outlaw in pursuit of a unique implant that holds the key to immortality. The game allows extensive customization of cyberware, skills, and playstyle. Choices made throughout the journey influence both the narrative and the world.

In 2077, following an economic collapse sometime during the early 21st century, the United States is forced to rely on large corporations to survive. These corporations deal in a wide range of areas, such as weapons, robotics, cybernetics, pharmaceuticals, communications and biotechnology, and many of these companies operate above the law. The world in between is where decadence, sex and pop culture mix with violent crime, extreme poverty and the unattainable promise of the American Dream. You play as V, a mercenary outlaw deeply embedded in the crime-ridden city of Night City, going after a one-of-a-kind implant that is the key to immortality.

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  About the Game     
  Cyberpunk 2077 is an open-world, action-adventure RPG set in the megalopolis of Night City, where you play as a cyberpunk mercenary wrapped up in a do-or-die fight for survival. Improved and featuring all-new free additional content, customize your character and playstyle as you take on jobs, build a reputation, and unlock upgrades. The relationships you forge and the choices you make will shape the story and the world around you. Legends are made here. What will yours be? 
     
  EXPLORE NIGHT CITY LIKE NEVER BEFORE WITH UPDATE 2.3! 
  Soak in the sights hands-free while you travel thanks to AutoDrive™ and Delamain’s taxi service. Take on new quests to earn preem rides, use the expanded CrystalCoat and TwinTone technologies to paint your vehicles, and enjoy even deeper levels of control and customization in Photo Mode!
  
     
  CREATE YOUR OWN CYBERPUNK
  Become an urban outlaw equipped with cybernetic enhancements and build your legend on the streets of Night City.
  
     
  EXPLORE THE CITY OF THE FUTURE
  Night City is packed to the brim with things to do, places to see, and people to meet. And it’s up to you where to go, when to go, and how to get there.
  
     
  BUILD YOUR LEGEND
  Go on daring adventures and build relationships with unforgettable characters whose fates are shaped by the choices you make.
  
     
  
  EQUIPPED WITH IMPROVEMENTS
  Experience Cyberpunk 2077 with a host of changes and improvements to gameplay and economy, the city, map usage, and more.
  
     
  CLAIM EXCLUSIVE ITEMS
  Claim in-game swag & digital goodies inspired by CD PROJEKT RED games as part of the My Rewards program.
  
  GO TO

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  Acerca del juego     
  Cyberpunk 2077 es un RPG de aventura y acción de mundo abierto ambientado en la megalópolis de Night City, donde te pondrás en la piel de un mercenario o una mercenaria ciberpunk y vivirás su lucha a vida o muerte por la supervivencia. Mejorado y con contenido nuevo adicional gratuito. Personaliza tu personaje y tu estilo de juego a medida que aceptas trabajos, te labras una reputación y desbloqueas mejoras. Las relaciones que forjes y las decisiones que tomes darán forma al mundo que te rodea. Aquí nacen las leyendas. ¿Cuál será la tuya?
  
     
  ¡EXPLORA NIGHT CITY COMO NUNCA ANTES CON LA ACTUALIZACIÓN 2.3!
  Suelta las manos del volante y goza de las vistas gracias a AutoDrive™ y al servicio de taxis de Delamain. Completa nuevas misiones para conseguir cochazos, usa las ampliaciones de las tecnologías CrystalCoat y TwinTone para pintar los vehículos y disfruta de un nivel aún mayor de control y personalización en el modo foto.
  
     
  CREA TU PROPIO CIBERPUNK
  Conviértete en un forajido urbano equipado con las últimas mejoras cibernéticas y escribe tu leyenda en las calles de Night City.
  
     
  EXPLORA LA CIUDAD DEL FUTURO
  Night City está repleta de cosas por hacer, lugares que visitar y gente que conocer. Y tú decides dónde ir, cuándo ir y cómo llegar allí.
  
     
  CONSTRUYE TU LEYENDA
  Emprende audaces aventuras y forja relaciones personales con personajes inolvidables cuyos destinos se decidirán a partir de las decisiones que tomes.
  
     
  EQUIPADO CON MEJORAS
  Vive la experiencia de Cyberpunk 2077 con un montón de cambios y mejoras en el sistema de juego, la economía, la ciudad, el uso del mapa y mucho más.
  
     
  CONSIGUE OBJETOS EXCLUSIVOS
  Consigue objetos del juego y artículos digitales inspirados por los juegos de CD PROJEKT RED como parte del programa Mis recompensas.
  
  VISITA

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  À propos du jeu     
  Cyberpunk 2077 est un RPG d'action-aventure en monde ouvert qui se déroule dans la mégalopole de Night City, où vous incarnez un cyber-mercenaire qui livre un combat sans merci pour sa survie. Avec des améliorations et du contenu additionnel gratuit, personnalisez entièrement votre personnage et votre style de jeu en accomplissant des boulots, améliorez votre réputation et déverrouillez des améliorations. Les relations que vous nouerez et les choix que vous ferez auront un impact sur l'histoire et le monde qui vous entoure. C'est ici que se forgent les légendes. Quelle sera la vôtre ?
  
     
  EXPLOREZ NIGHT CITY COMME JAMAIS AVEC LA MISE À JOUR 2.3 !
  Profitez de la vue pendant vos trajets en ayant les mains libres grâce à AutoDrive™ et au service de taxi Delamain. Accomplissez de nouvelles quêtes pour obtenir des caisses premios, utilisez les technologies améliorées CrystalCoat et TwinTone pour peindre vos véhicules et profitez d'outils de gestion et de personnalisation encore plus poussés dans le mode photo !
  
     
  CRÉEZ VOTRE PROPRE CYBERPUNK
  Devenez un hors-la-loi urbain équipé d'améliorations cybernétiques et forgez votre légende dans les rues de Night City.
  
     
  EXPLOREZ LA VILLE DU FUTUR
  Night City regorge de choses à faire, d'endroits à voir et de gens à rencontrer. Et vous êtes libre d'aller où vous voulez, quand vous voulez, comme vous voulez.
  
     
  
  
  FORGEZ VOTRE LÉGENDE
  Lancez-vous dans des aventures risquées et nouez des relations avec des personnages inoubliables dont le sort dépendra de vos choix.
  
     
  PROFITEZ DES AMÉLIORATIONS
  Redécouvrez Cyberpunk 2077 avec de nombreux changements et améliorations apportés au gameplay, à l'économie, à l'ergonomie de la carte et bien plus.
  
     
  OBTENEZ DES OBJETS EXCLUSIFS
  Obtenez des cadeaux en jeu et des goodies numériques inspirés des jeux CD PROJEKT RED dans le cadre du programme Mes Récompenses.
  
  RENDEZ-VOUS SUR

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  Infos zum Spiel     
  Cyberpunk 2077 ist ein Open-World-Action-Adventure-RPG, bei dem du in Night City einen Cyberpunk-Söldner spielst, der ums Überleben kämpft. Passe deinen Charakter und deinen Spielstil nach Belieben an, während du Aufträge annimmst, deinen Ruf verbesserst und Upgrades freischaltest – jetzt mit Verbesserungen und brandneuen, kostenlosen Bonus-Inhalten! Deine Beziehungen mit anderen Charakteren und deine Entscheidungen verändern die Geschichte und die Welt um dich herum. Hier entstehen Legenden. Wie wird deine aussehen?
  
     
  ERKUNDE NIGHT CITY WIE NIE ZUVOR MIT UPDATE 2.3!
  Konzentriere dich voll und ganz auf die Aussicht dank AutoDrive™ und Delamains Taxidienst. Verdiene dir mit neuen Quests nova Fahrzeuge, lackiere deine Autos mit den erweiterten CrystalCoat- und TwinTone-Technologien und freue dich auf noch detailliertere Optionen zur Steuerung und Anpassung im Fotomodus!
  
     
  ERSTELLE DEINEN EIGENEN CYBERPUNK
  Steige als Cyberpunk, einem gesetzlosen Großstadt-Söldner, ausgestattet mit kybernetischen Verbesserungen, in den Straßen von Night City zur Legende auf..
  
     
  ERKUNDE DIE STADT DER ZUKUNFT
  In Night City wird es nie langweilig. Du entscheidest, wann du wohin gehen möchtest und wie du dorthin kommst.
     
  
  BAUE DEINE LEGENDE AUF
  Stürze dich in gefährliche Abenteuer und baue Beziehungen zu einzigartigen Charakteren auf, deren Schicksal von deinen Entscheidungen abhängt.
  
     
  AUSGESTATTET MIT VERBESSERUNGEN
  Erlebe Cyberpunk 2077 mit jeder Menge Verbesserungen an Gameplay und Ökonomie, an der Stadt, an der Kartennutzung und vielem mehr.
  
     
  HOL DIR EXKLUSIVE ITEMS
  Hol dir im Rahmen des Programms Meine Belohnungen In-Game-Boni & digitale Goodies, die von Spielen von CD PROJEKT RED inspiriert sind.
  
  BESUCHE

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  Acerca do jogo     
  Cyberpunk 2077 é um RPG de ação e aventura num mundo aberto que decorre na megalópole de Night City, onde és um mercenário cyberpunk a lutar pela sobrevivência. Melhorado com mais conteúdos grátis, personaliza a tua personagem e estilo de jogo, aceita missões, estabelece a tua reputação e desbloqueia melhorias. As relações que criares e escolhas que tomares vão moldar a tua história e o teu mundo. As lendas são feitas aqui. Como será a tua?
  
     
  EXPLORA NIGHT CITY COMO NUNCA ANTES COM A ATUALIZAÇÃO 2.3!
  Aprecia a paisagem com as mãos livres enquanto viajas graças ao AutoDrive™ e ao serviço de táxis da Delamain. Aceita novas missões para ganhar veículos preem, usar as tecnologias expandidas CrystalCoat e TwinTone para pintar os teus veículos e desfrutar de níveis ainda mais aprofundados de controlo e personalização no Modo de Fotografia!
  
     
  CRIA O TEU CYBERPUNK
  Transforma-te num fora-da-lei urbano, equipado com melhorias cibernéticas, e cria a tua lenda nas ruas de Night City.
  
     
  EXPLORA A CIDADE DO FUTURO
  Night City está cheia de coisas para fazer, sítios para visitar e pessoas para conhecer. Só tu decides onde vais, quando vais e como lá chegas.
  
     
  CRIA A TUA LENDA
  Parte em aventuras entusiasmantes e cria relações com personagens inesquecíveis cujos destinos são moldados pelas tuas decisões.
     
  EQUIPA-TE COM MELHORIAS
  Joga Cyberpunk 2077 com novas alterações e melhorias de jogabilidade, economia, na cidade, na utilização do mapa e muito mais.
  
     
  OBTÉM ITENS EXCLUSIVOS
  Obtém itens de jogo digitais cheios de estilo, inspirados nos jogos dos estúdios CD PROJEKT RED como parte do programa As Minhas Recompensas.
  
  VISITA

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  Om spillet     
  Cyberpunk 2077 er et actionfyldt rollespil i en åben verden, der består af en dyster fremtidsby ved navn Night City, hvor du spiller som en cyberpunk-lejesoldat, der bliver viklet ind i en dødbringende kamp for overlevelse. Forbedret og med helt nyt, gratis indhold: Tilpas din figur og spillestil, mens du udfører missioner, opbyg dit omdømme, og lås op for opgraderinger. De forhold, du skaber, og de valg, du træffer, vil forme historien og verden omkring dig. Legender skabes her. Hvad bliver din?
  
     
  UDFORSK NIGHT CITY SOM ALDRIG FØR MED OPDATERING 2.3!
  Nyd udsigten uden at bruge hænderne, når du rejser, takket være AutoDrive™ og Delamains taxitjeneste. Drag ud på nye missioner for at optjene Preem Rides, brug de udvidede CrystalCoat- og TwinTone-teknologier til at male dine køretøjer, og nyd endnu mere kontrol og tilpasning i fototilstanden!
  
     
  LAV DIN EGEN CYBERPUNK
  Bliv udstyret med cybermodifikationer, og træd uden for loven, så du kan skabe legenden om dig selv i Night Citys gader.
  
     
  UDFORSK FREMTIDENS BY
  Night City er smækfyldt med ting at foretage sig, steder at opleve og personer at møde. Du bestemmer selv, hvor, hvornår og hvordan du tager på eventyr.
  
  
     
  SKAB DIN EGEN LEGENDE
  Tag på vovede eventyr, og opbyg relationer til de uforglemmelige spilfigurer – deres skæbner afhænger af dig.
  
     
  
  UDSTYRET MED FORBEDRINGER
  Oplev Cyberpunk 2077 med en masse forbedringer i spillet og økonomien, byen, kortbrug og meget mere.
  
     
  GØR KRAV PÅ EKSKLUSIVE GENSTANDE
  Gør krav på in-game swag og digitale godbidder inspireret af CD PROJEKT RED-spil som en del af My Rewards-programmet.
  
  GÅ TIL

Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate Edition      
 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco     
  Cyberpunk 2077 è un GDR d'azione a mondo aperto ambientato nella megalopoli Night City, nella quale diventi un mercenario cyberpunk coinvolto in una lotta per la sopravvivenza. Migliorato e con contenuti aggiuntivi gratuiti. Personalizza avatar e stile di gioco, accetta incarichi, fatti un nome e sblocca potenziamenti. Stringerai relazioni e prenderai decisioni che decideranno la tua storia e daranno forma al mondo attorno a te. Le leggende nascono qui. Quale sarà la tua?
  
     
  ESPLORA NIGHT CITY COME MAI PRIMA D'ORA CON L'AGGIORNAMENTO 2.3!
  Goditi il panorama senza pensare alla guida grazie ad AutoDrive™ e al servizio taxi Delamain. Affronta nuove missioni per ottenere veicoli fantastici, usa le nuove applicazioni delle tecnologie CrystalCoat e TwinTone per riverniciare i tuoi veicoli e scopri altre possibilità di controllo e personalizzazione nella modalità foto!
  
     
  CREA IL TUO CYBERPUNK
  Diventa un fuorilegge urbano dotato di potenziamenti cibernetici, e crea la tua leggenda sulle strade di Night City.
  
     
  ESPLORA LA CITTÀ DEL FUTURO
  Night City è piena zeppa di cose da fare, luoghi da vedere e persone da incontrare. Sarai tu a scegliere dove, quando e come andare.
  
     
  CREA LA TUA LEGGENDA
  Affronta incredibili avventure e stringi relazioni con personaggi indimenticabili, i cui destini saranno plasmati dalle tue scelte.
  
     
  MIGLIORIE DA UN FUTURO OSCURO
  Prova Cyberpunk 2077 con una serie di cambiamenti e miglioramenti al gioco e all'economia, alla città, all'utilizzo della mappa e molto altro ancora.
  
     
  OTTIENI OGGETTI ESCLUSIVI
  Ottieni oggetti di gioco e bonus digitali ispirati dai giochi di CD PROJEKT RED come parte del programma Le mie ricompense.
  
  VISITA

《赛博朋克 2077》是一款开放世界动作冒险游戏，故事发生在夜之城。这是一座五光十色的大都会，权力更迭和身体改造是不变的主题。您扮演一名野心勃勃的雇佣兵：V，正在追寻一种独一无二的植入体。只要得到它，就能掌握获得永生的关键。您可以自定义角色的义体、技能和玩法，探索包罗万象的城市。您做出的选择也将会对剧情和周遭的世界产生影响。

●扮演亡命街头的雇佣兵
化身装备机械强化义体的城市雇佣兵，成为一名赛博朋克，在夜之城的街头谱写属于您的传奇。

●未来都市的街头百态
进入夜之城的庞大开放世界。在这里，视觉效果、复杂程度和游戏深度都将得到全新的定义。

●盗走能够带来永生的植入体
接下有生以来最危险的任务，追寻能够带来永生的原型植入体。
